HGSS.639.0001:
Who? You sound like you’re underwater.
This is not a good connection. At all.\f
Get another line somewhere else, OK?
HGSS.639.0002:
Hello...
OK, now I can hear you.\r
Yeah, I’m in top form.\f
HGSS.639.0003:
Are there any Gym Leaders you haven’t
battled yet?\r
Step up! Get on it!
HGSS.639.0004:
Let’s see... I’m free Saturday mornings
usually.\r
Please, give me a call then.
HGSS.639.0005:
I was hoping for an invitation!
We’re battling again, correct?[0200,0000]
HGSS.639.0006:
Excellent! Glad to hear it.
I’m looking forward to this.\f
I’ll be waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City!
HGSS.639.0007:
Sure, sure...
I know you’ve got a busy schedule...
HGSS.639.0008:
I’ve got to say this...
Before we battle again, how about you\r
keep any promises you made to\r
others first?
HGSS.639.0009:
I’m waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City!\r
That was a promise!
HGSS.639.0010:
Hey, this is Falkner.
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.639.0011:
You know our plans to meet at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City?\r
That’s still on your mind, isn’t it?
HGSS.639.0012:
My dad told me something when I was
a kid.\f
He said “Falkner, bird Pokémon don’t
just fly with their wings, they soar\r
through the sky because that’s what\r
they want to do with all their heart.”\f
That’s just like my dad.
HGSS.639.0013:
The scaffolding in my Gym was in bad
shape when you came to battle, eh?\f
Every year, we give the place a
thorough scrubbing. It’s a challenge.\f
But the bird Pokémon help us out,
so we’re able to manage.
HGSS.639.0014:
You’ve chatted with Janine in
Fuchsia City, haven’t you?\f
All she ever talks about is her dad,
you know? Endlessly.\f
I mean, it’s good to have a healthy
respect for your dad, but it’s\r
better to have some self-confidence!\f
Don’t you have faith in your
own abilities?
